auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Fireflies API key sent with the Authorization Bearer header to the GraphQL endpoint.

actions.name: continue_askfred_thread
actions.description: Continue a Fireflies AskFred thread with a follow-up question.

query.description: The follow-up AskFred query to execute.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for continuing a Fireflies AskFred thread.

actions.name: create_askfred_thread
actions.description: Create a Fireflies AskFred thread from a meeting question.

transcript_id.description: The Fireflies transcript identifier used for a single-meeting AskFred query.

start_time.description: Inclusive start datetime for AskFred meeting filters.

end_time.description: Inclusive end datetime for AskFred meeting filters.

organizers.description: Organizer email addresses used to filter AskFred meetings.

participants.description: Participant email addresses used to filter AskFred meetings.

channel_ids.description: Channel identifiers used to filter AskFred meetings.

transcript_ids.description: Transcript identifiers used to filter AskFred meetings.

filters.description: Meeting filters for Fireflies AskFred queries.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Fireflies AskFred thread.

actions.name: create_bite
actions.description: Create a Fireflies bite from a transcript time range.

transcript_id.description: The Fireflies transcript identifier used to create the bite.

start_time.description: The bite start time in seconds.

end_time.description: The bite end time in seconds.

name.description: The name for the created bite.

summary.description: The summary for the created bite.

media_type.description: The media type to create for the bite.

privacies.description: Visibility settings for the created bite.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Fireflies bite.

actions.name: delete_askfred_thread
actions.description: Delete a Fireflies AskFred thread by thread ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Fireflies AskFred thread.

outputSchema.description: The Fireflies delete AskFred thread response.

actions.name: delete_transcript
actions.description: Delete a Fireflies transcript by transcript ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Fireflies transcript.

date.description: The deleted transcript timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

host_email.description: The deleted transcript host email address.

items.description: A deleted transcript participant email address.

participants.description: Participant email addresses on the deleted transcript.

items.description: A Fireflies user linked to the deleted transcript.

fireflies_users.description: Fireflies users linked to the deleted transcript.

organizer_email.description: The deleted transcript organizer email address.

actions.name: execute_graphql_query
actions.description: Execute a raw read-only Fireflies GraphQL query and return the raw response.

variables.description: GraphQL variables used with the query document.

operationName.description: The GraphQL operation name to execute.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for executing a raw Fireflies GraphQL query.

anyOf.description: The raw Fireflies GraphQL data payload.

friendly.description: Whether the GraphQL error is safe to display.

path.description: Path segments for the GraphQL error.

extensions.description: Extensions attached to the GraphQL error.

errors.description: GraphQL errors returned by the Fireflies query.

extensions.description: Additional metadata returned by the Fireflies GraphQL response.

outputSchema.description: The raw Fireflies GraphQL query response.

actions.name: get_askfred_thread
actions.description: Get a Fireflies AskFred thread by thread ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a Fireflies AskFred thread by ID.

messages.description: Messages returned for the AskFred thread.

askfred_thread.description: A Fireflies AskFred thread with messages.

actions.name: get_bite
actions.description: Get a Fireflies bite by bite ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a Fireflies bite by ID.

transcript_id.description: The Fireflies transcript identifier for the bite.

name.description: The Fireflies bite user display name.

picture.description: The bite user profile picture URL.

user_id.description: The Fireflies user identifier that created the bite.

end_time.description: The bite end time in seconds.

start_time.description: The bite start time in seconds.

id.description: The source identifier for the bite.

name.description: The source name for the bite.

type.description: The source type for the bite.

duration.description: The source duration for the bite in seconds.

description.description: The source description for the bite.

created_from.description: The origin information for a Fireflies bite.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the authenticated Fireflies user for the current API key.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

is_admin.description: Whether the Fireflies user is an admin.

recent_meeting.description: The most recent meeting for the user.

recent_transcript.description: The most recent transcript for the user.

num_transcripts.description: The number of transcripts for the user.

minutes_consumed.description: The meeting minutes consumed by the user.

integrations.description: Integrations enabled for the Fireflies user.

members.description: Members in the Fireflies user group.

user_groups.description: User groups attached to the Fireflies user.

actions.description: Get a Fireflies transcript by transcript ID.

date.description: The transcript timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

recent_meeting.description: The most recent meeting for the user.

recent_transcript.description: The most recent transcript for the user.

num_transcripts.description: The number of transcripts for the user.

minutes_consumed.description: The meeting minutes consumed by the user.

integrations.description: Integrations enabled for the Fireflies user.

members.description: Members in the Fireflies user group.

user_groups.description: User groups attached to the Fireflies user.

bullet_gist.description: A bullet summary of the meeting.

items.description: A topic discussed in the meeting.

start_time.description: The sentence start time in seconds.

end_time.description: The sentence end time in seconds.

meeting_attendees.description: Meeting attendee details for the transcript.

is_private.description: Whether the Fireflies channel is private.

members.description: Members visible on the Fireflies channel.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Get a Fireflies user by user ID.

is_admin.description: Whether the Fireflies user is an admin.

members.description: Members in the Fireflies user group.

actions.name: list_ai_app_outputs
actions.description: List Fireflies AI app outputs for transcripts or app IDs.

app_id.description: The Fireflies AI app identifier used to filter outputs.

transcript_id.description: The Fireflies transcript identifier used to filter AI app outputs.

skip.description: The number of AI app outputs to skip before returning results.

limit.description: The maximum number of AI app outputs to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Fireflies AI app outputs.

title.description: The meeting title for the AI app output.

prompt.description: The prompt sent to the AI app.

user_id.description: The Fireflies user identifier for the AI app output.

created_at.description: The AI app output creation timestamp.

outputs.description: Fireflies AI app outputs returned by the request.

outputSchema.description: The Fireflies AI app outputs response.

actions.name: list_askfred_threads
actions.description: List Fireflies AskFred conversation threads.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Fireflies AskFred threads.

askfred_threads.description: Fireflies AskFred threads returned by the request.

actions.name: list_bites
actions.description: List Fireflies bites using the available bite filters.

mine.description: Whether to return only bites created by the current user.

my_team.description: Whether to return bites created by the current team.

transcript_id.description: The Fireflies transcript identifier used to filter bites.

skip.description: The number of bites to skip before returning results.

limit.description: The maximum number of Fireflies bites to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Fireflies bites.

transcript_id.description: The Fireflies transcript identifier for the bite.

name.description: The Fireflies bite user display name.

picture.description: The bite user profile picture URL.

user_id.description: The Fireflies user identifier that created the bite.

end_time.description: The bite end time in seconds.

start_time.description: The bite start time in seconds.

id.description: The source identifier for the bite.

name.description: The source name for the bite.

type.description: The source type for the bite.

duration.description: The source duration for the bite in seconds.

description.description: The source description for the bite.

created_from.description: The origin information for a Fireflies bite.

bites.description: Fireflies bites returned by the request.

actions.name: list_channels
actions.description: List Fireflies channels visible to the current API key.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

is_private.description: Whether the Fireflies channel is private.

members.description: Members visible on the Fireflies channel.

channels.description: Fireflies channels returned by the request.

actions.name: list_transcripts
actions.description: List Fireflies transcripts with official filters and include flags.

skip.description: The number of Fireflies transcripts to skip before returning results.

limit.description: The maximum number of Fireflies transcripts to return.

user_id.description: The Fireflies user identifier used to filter transcripts.

from_date.description: Inclusive start datetime for transcript filtering.

to_date.description: Inclusive end datetime for transcript filtering.

organizers.description: Organizer email addresses used to filter transcripts.

participants.description: Participant email addresses used to filter transcripts.

channel_id.description: The Fireflies channel identifier used to filter transcripts.

include_summary.description: Whether to include transcript summary data.

include_analytics.description: Whether to include transcript analytics data.

include_audio_url.description: Whether to include the transcript audio URL.

include_video_url.description: Whether to include the transcript video URL.

include_apps_preview.description: Whether to include transcript app preview data.

include_user_details.description: Whether to include detailed user information.

include_meeting_attendance.description: Whether to include meeting attendance details.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Fireflies transcripts.

date.description: The transcript timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

is_admin.description: Whether the Fireflies user is an admin.

recent_meeting.description: The most recent meeting for the user.

recent_transcript.description: The most recent transcript for the user.

num_transcripts.description: The number of transcripts for the user.

minutes_consumed.description: The meeting minutes consumed by the user.

integrations.description: Integrations enabled for the Fireflies user.

members.description: Members in the Fireflies user group.

user_groups.description: User groups attached to the Fireflies user.

bullet_gist.description: A bullet summary of the meeting.

items.description: A topic discussed in the meeting.

start_time.description: The sentence start time in seconds.

end_time.description: The sentence end time in seconds.

meeting_attendees.description: Meeting attendee details for the transcript.

is_private.description: Whether the Fireflies channel is private.

members.description: Members visible on the Fireflies channel.

transcripts.description: Fireflies transcripts returned by the request.

actions.name: update_meeting_channel
actions.description: Update the Fireflies channel assignments for one or more meetings.

members.description: Members visible on the Fireflies channel.

channels.description: Channels linked to the updated meeting.

updated_meetings.description: Meetings returned by the Fireflies channel update mutation.

actions.description: Update the privacy value for a Fireflies meeting.
